ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was created */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount of the invoice */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for currency conversion */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the invoice */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being billed */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice that this item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item on the invoice */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item on the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item on the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the item entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the item entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the invoice item entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the invoice item entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the item without tax */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for receiving a new shipment from the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the item was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the item was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the item entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the item entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the customer entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the customer entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, clerk) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment method was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payment method entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payment method entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice that the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment transaction was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payment transaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payment transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
